role: Media entrepreneur and co-founder of Manoto TV
bio: Kayvan Abbassi is an Iranian-British media entrepreneur and the co-founder of [Manoto TV](/orgs/manoto-tv), the Persian-language satellite television channel launched in 2010. Together with his wife Marjan Abbassi, he built Manoto into one of the most-watched Persian-language channels globally, combining entertainment with news coverage and maintaining a secular, non-partisan editorial stance. The channel operated from London and reached audiences inside Iran despite regime jamming efforts. Manoto ceased live broadcasting in 2024 and transitioned to on-demand digital content.
editorial_notes: Iranian-British. Co-founded Manoto with wife Marjan Abbassi. Based in London.
